CivBonuses.Name: Warrior Culture
CivBonuses.History: The Maori were knowledgeable in woodworking, and training soldiers to be both strong. Additionally due to their warrior culture people were encouraged to train in combat arts.
CivBonuses.Description: Provides a 10% faster build speed, 10% higher health, of all military units

CivBonuses.Name: Environmental Construction
CivBonuses.History: Maori used the environment to construct their buildings, making them cheaper, but still strong enough to withstand the tropical conditions of New Zealand.
CivBonuses.Description: Maori Buildings are 10% cheaper to construct, and 5% stronger.
